added: Video auto-pause on scroll — videos stop when scrolled off-screen
Autoplay setting toggle in Settings controls scroll behavior
Security hardening Phase 2: rate limiting, upload validation, admin logs
changed: DM sending now server-side rate limited (30 msgs/60s)
Search uses server-side parameterized query (no more string interpolation)
File uploads restricted to JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF only
fixed: Instagram/TikTok/Spotify embeds now pause when scrolled away
RLS gaps patched for notifications, messages, user_skins, group_skins
Multiple videos could play simultaneously without being able to find them

added: XSS sanitization on 45+ user-content injection points
Cookie consent banner gating all third-party embeds
Delete My Account button in Settings with double confirmation
Super Admin Panel with user management, suspend, and delete
Profile RLS — sensitive columns hidden from other users
changed: Own profile data now fetched via secure RPC instead of direct query
Admin actions enforced server-side via SECURITY DEFINER functions
Geolocation changed to opt-in (was firing unconditionally)
fixed: Search injection via PostgREST filter characters
Admin privilege escalation blocked (is_admin column revoked from client)

added: Inline media embeds for YouTube, Vimeo, TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, Spotify, SoundCloud
Version-based TOS acceptance system — forces re-accept on TOS update
Newline preservation in posts, comments, and messages
Updated Terms of Service (v3) with 21 sections
My Posts tab in main feed
changed: YouTube embeds switched to privacy-enhanced youtube-nocookie.com
Instagram embeds switched to iframe for reliable mobile playback
Video embeds use proper 16:9 aspect ratio container
fixed: Suggestion name overflow cutting into neighboring cards
People You May Know moved from hidden left sidebar to right sidebar

added: Per-photo comments in lightbox viewer (desktop panel + mobile sheet)
Per-photo likes and dislikes with optimistic UI
Album system with pill tabs, upload, and drag-scroll
Saved posts page with folder pill tabs
Mobile bottom nav bar extended to tablets (≤768px)
changed: Coins no longer awarded for interacting with your own content
Albums tab shown for all users (own + others), not just self
fixed: Tablet swipe jumping to wrong category in skin shops
Groups page defaults to My Groups tab
Mobile refresh going to home screen (localStorage fallback)
Cross-device sync not working on mobile (visibilitychange listener)
Saved posts not showing up (was only checking current feed)
Premium transparency bleeding into group view
